description: Reported Uber Cash and Uber One as 'NOT ENROLLED' on Amex Platinum. David confirmed both are enrolled and benefits have been received. Root cause: read benefit status from 'Your Benefit Highlights' section on the Amex portal, which does not accurately reflect enrollment or credit usage. The correct source is the 'Benefits Activity' section — must click 'Show All' to see accurate per-benefit status, credits used, and enrollment state.
correction: Uber Cash = enrolled and active. Uber One = enrolled and active. For Amex benefit status, always navigate to Benefits Activity and click 'Show All' — never use 'Your Benefit Highlights' as the source of truth.
systemic_fix: Amex portal rule: benefit enrollment status and credit usage must ONLY be read from the 'Benefits Activity' section after clicking 'Show All'. 'Your Benefit Highlights' is a marketing display — it is not reliable for enrollment or usage data. This applies to all Amex card walkthroughs.
